Front:
عنجد
(ʿanjad)
Back:
really?
Example:
عنجد رح تيجي اليوم؟
ʿanjad raḥ tiji l-yōm?
Really, you’re coming today?

Front:
أكيد
(akeed)
Back:
of course
Example:
أكيد، بشوفك بالليل.
akeed, bshūfak bil-lēl.
Of course, I’ll see you tonight.

Front:
ماشي
(māshi)
Back:
ok / sounds good
Example:
ماشي، خلّينا نبلّش هلق.
māshi, khallīna nballeš hallaʾ.
Sounds good, let’s start now.

Front:
ولا شي
(wala shi)
Back:
nothing
Example:
شو صار؟ ولا شي، كلّو تمام.
shu ṣār? wala shi, killo tamām.
What happened? Nothing, everything is fine.

Front:
لحظة
(laḥẓa)
Back:
one second
Example:
لحظة، عم ردّ عالتلفون.
laḥẓa, ʿam rudd ʿa t-telefōn.
One second, I’m answering the phone.

Front:
طيب
(ṭayyib)
Back:
okay / alright
Example:
طيب، منلتقي بكرا الصبح.
ṭayyib, mnilteʾi bukra ṣ-ṣubḥ.
Alright, we’ll meet tomorrow morning.

Front:
شو؟
(shu)
Back:
what?
Example:
شو؟ ما سمعتك منيح.
shu? ma smeʿtak mniḥ.
What? I didn’t hear you well.

Front:
ليش؟
(leish)
Back:
why?
Example:
ليش متأخّر اليوم؟
lēsh mtaʾakhkher il-yōm?
Why are you late today?

Front:
تمام
(tamām)
Back:
perfect / great
Example:
تمام، كل شي جاهز.
tamām, kill shi jāhez.
Great, everything is ready.

Front:
ممتاز
(mumtāz)
Back:
excellent
Example:
ممتاز! هيك أحسن بكتير.
mumtāz! hēk aḥsan bktīr.
Excellent! This is much better.

Front:
يمكن
(yimkin)
Back:
maybe
Example:
يمكن أخلص الشغل بكّير.
yumkin akhalliṣ ish-shughl bakkīr.
Maybe I’ll finish work early.

Front:
أكيد لا
(akeed la)
Back:
of course not
Example:
أكيد لا، ما بصير هيك.
akeed la, ma bṣīr hēk.
Of course not, that’s not okay.

Front:
آه
(āh)
Back:
yes
Example:
آه، فهمت عليك هلق.
āh, fhemt ʿalēk hallaʾ.
Yeah, I understand you now.

Front:
لا
(la)
Back:
no
Example:
لا، اليوم ما عندي وقت.
la, il-yōm ma ʿindī waʾt.
No, I don’t have time today.

Front:
بصراحة
(bi-ṣarāḥa)
Back:
honestly
Example:
بصراحة، هالفكرة كتير حلوة.
biṣarāḥa, hal-fikra ktīr ḥilwe.
Honestly, this idea is really nice.

Front:
ما بعرف
(ma baʿrif)
Back:
I don't know
Example:
ما بعرف وين المفتاح.
ma baʿref wēn il-miftāḥ.
I don’t know where the key is.

Front:
ممكن
(mumkin)
Back:
maybe / possible
Example:
ممكن تبعتلي العنوان؟
mumkin tibʿatlī il-ʿunwān?
Could you send me the address?

Front:
أكيد طبعا
(akeed ṭabʿan)
Back:
yes of course
Example:
أكيد طبعاً، أنا جاهز.
akeed ṭabʿan, ana jāhez.
Yes, of course, I’m ready.

Front:
لحظة شوي
(laḥẓa shway)
Back:
wait a bit
Example:
لحظة شوي، الطريق مزحوم.
laḥẓa shway, iṭ-ṭarīʾ mazḥūm.
Wait a bit, the road is crowded.

Front:
دقيقة
(daqeeqa)
Back:
one minute
Example:
دقيقة، بخلص وبجي.
daqīʾa, bakhalliṣ wbjī.
One minute, I’ll finish and come.

Front:
ولا يهمك
(wala yhemmak)
Back:
no problem
Example:
ولا يهمك، أنا بساعدك.
wala yhemmak, ana bsaʿdak.
No worries, I’ll help you.

Front:
عنجد
(ʿanjad)

ʿanjad raḥ tiji l-yōm?
